2603.25351.title: Image Rotation Angle Estimation: Comparing Circular-Aware Methods
2603.25351.paper_summary: Automatic image rotation estimation is a key preprocessing step in many vision pipelines. This task is challenging because angles have circular topology, creating boundary discontinuities that hinder standard regression methods. We present a comprehensive study of five circular-aware methods for global orientation estimation: direct angle regression with circular loss, classification via angular binning, unit-vector regression, phase-shifting coder, and circular Gaussian distribution. Using transfer learning from ImageNet-pretrained models, we systematically evaluate these methods across sixteen modern architectures by adapting their output heads for rotation-specific predictions. Our results show that probabilistic methods, particularly the circular Gaussian distribution, are the most robust across architectures, while classification achieves the best accuracy on well-matched backbones but suffers training instabilities on others. The best configuration (classification with EfficientViT-B3) achieves a mean absolute error (MAE) of 1.23° (mean across five independent runs) on the DRC-D dataset, while the circular Gaussian distribution with MambaOut Base achieves a virtually identical 1.24° with greater robustness across backbones. Training and evaluating our top-performing method-architecture combinations on COCO 2014, the best configuration reaches 3.71° MAE, improving substantially over prior work, with further improvement to 2.84° on the larger COCO 2017 dataset.
2603.25351.paper_summary_zh: 自動圖像旋轉估計是許多視覺管道中的關鍵預處理步驟。這項任務具有挑戰性，因為角度具有圓形拓撲，造成邊界不連續性，妨礙標準迴歸方法。我們提出了五種圓形感知方法的綜合研究，用於全局方向估計：帶有圓形損失的直接角度迴歸、通過角度分箱的分類、單位向量迴歸、相位移碼器和圓形高斯分佈。通過從ImageNet預訓練模型進行轉移學習，我們系統性地評估了這些方法在十六種現代架構中的表現，通過調整其輸出頭以進行特定於旋轉的預測。我們的結果顯示，概率方法，特別是圓形高斯分佈，在不同架構中最具穩健性，而分類在與骨幹匹配良好的情況下達到最佳準確性，但在其他情況下則遭遇訓練不穩定性。最佳配置（使用EfficientViT-B3的分類）在DRC-D數據集上達到1.23°的平均絕對誤差（MAE）（五次獨立運行的平均值），而使用MambaOut Base的圓形高斯分佈則以更大的穩健性達到幾乎相同的1.24°。在COCO 2014上訓練和評估我們表現最佳的方法-架構組合，最佳配置達到3.71° MAE，顯著改善了先前的工作，並在更大的COCO 2017數據集上進一步改善至2.84°。
2603.25351.author: Maximilian Woehrer et.al.
